# LucentStar AI

> LucentStar AI builds practical AI products and bespoke workflow systems for businesses that need usable AI, not another prompt.

## Products

- [LucentSignal](https://lucentstar.ai/lucentsignal.html): LinkedIn writing tool with voice matching, quality scoring, and calendar scheduling. Free to start.

## Guides

- [8 Best Taplio Alternatives in 2026 (Tested & Compared)](https://lucentstar.ai/blog/taplio-alternatives.html): Comparison of 8 LinkedIn writing tools on voice matching, account safety and pricing. Updated June 2026.
- [Safe LinkedIn Tools: Which Ones Never Touch Your Account](https://lucentstar.ai/blog/safe-linkedin-tools.html): The three access methods, the two-minute safety audit, and why some tools can threaten your LinkedIn account. Updated June 2026.
